title.en: ARRANGEMENTS OF HEATING, COOLING, VENTILATING OR OTHER AIR-TREATING DEVICES SPECIALLY ADAPTED FOR PASSENGER OR GOODS SPACES OF VEHICLES
Heating, cooling or ventilating devices
{Combined heating, ventilating, or cooling devices (control systems or mechanisms B60H1/00642)}
{the devices being independent of the vehicle}
{HVAC devices specially adapted for particular vehicle parts or components and being connected to the vehicle HVAC unit}
{Arrangements permitting a rapid heating of the heating liquid (B60H1/00492, B60H1/03 take precedence)}
{Heat exchangers for air-conditioning devices (B60H1/3227 takes precedence)}
{Air-conditioning arrangements specially adapted for particular vehicles}
{Driving arrangements for parts of a vehicle air-conditioning (B60H1/3222 takes precedence)}
{Ventilation unit, e.g. combined with a radiator (control systems for ventilators B60H1/00828)}
{Air-conditioning devices using the Peltier effect}
{Valves for air-conditioning devices, e.g. thermostatic valves}
{comprising regenerative heating or cooling means, e.g. heat accumulators}
{Details, e.g. mounting arrangements, desaeration devices (B60H1/32 takes precedence)}
{Control systems or circuits; Control members or indication devices for heating, cooling or ventilating devices (B60H1/3201 - B60H1/3208, B60H1/3225 take precedence)}
the heat being derived from the propulsion plant
the heat source being other than the propulsion plant {(B60H1/00492 takes precedence)}
Ventilating devices where the heating or cooling is irrelevant (nozzles or air-diffusers B60H1/34)
Cooling devices {(B60H1/00478, B60H1/005 take precedence)}
Nozzles; Air-diffusers
Other air-treating devices
{Adding substances other than water to the air, e.g. perfume, oxygen}
{Electrically conditioning the air, e.g. by ionizing}
{Smell or pollution preventing arrangements (B60H3/0007, B60H3/0071, B60H3/02, B60H3/06 take precedence)}
Moistening {; Humidity control}
Filtering
